description_long: This is a rectangular vending machine with a predominantly yellow and white striped exterior, featuring a front panel covered with product images and selection buttons. The front face displays multiple illuminated product windows, each showing a different ice cream option, along with a digital display and a payment interface to the right. The sides of the machine are decorated with promotional graphics and text, including images of ice cream and blue signage. The top of the machine is flat and appears to be covered with a protective layer. The lower front section contains a product retrieval slot, and the overall build suggests a sturdy, metallic construction typical of urban vending machines. The machine is designed for outdoor or semi-outdoor placement, suitable for sidewalks, parks, or public spaces.
description: A yellow and white striped vending machine with illuminated product windows, a digital display, and a product retrieval slot, decorated with ice cream graphics and signage.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main product selection area, digital display, payment interface, and product retrieval slot, with clear branding and product images.
description_view_1: The left side view displays vertical stripes, a promotional ice cream graphic, and signage, with no visible interactive components.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back and partial sides, with the product selection area visible but less detail on interactive elements.
description_view_3: The right side view features similar vertical stripes and promotional graphics as the left, with no visible interactive parts.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular digital display panel is located on the upper right section of the front face, medium-sized, with illuminated content and adjacent printed instructions.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present to the right of the product selection area, featuring a card reader and possibly a contactless terminal, with visible slots and a small screen.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: There are multiple individual product selection buttons arranged in a grid below each product image on the front panel, each clearly labeled with product information.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular product retrieval slot is located at the lower center of the front face, with a visible flap for accessing dispensed items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding is visible at the top front with the text 'ICE CREAM' in gold, and additional blue signage and product images are present on the front and sides.
